title: Tasker Group Tasks
description: Schema for .tasker/tasks/*.yml files - task definitions within a Tasker group

tasks.description: Task definitions. Keys use {environment}:{action} format (e.g., dev:build, prod:deploy)

name.description: Display name for the task (shown in help output)

description.description: Task description (shown in task listings and generated desc field)

environment.description: Environment this task belongs to. When set, generates a precondition that checks the ENV variable. Must match a key in Tasker.yml environments

dir.description: Working directory for the task. Supports Taskfile template syntax

deps.description: Task dependencies (run before this task). Use full task keys ({group}:{env}:{action})
